default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on production status and new strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**PPC Ads Blocked:** Launch is on hold pending updates to 2–3 articles. Rachel will deliver the updates by EOD today or tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**New Content Initiative:** Flosum tasked GrowthX with creating content on the "shared responsibility model" to educate users on their security duties beyond Salesforce's native protection.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**H1 Strategy Meeting:** Matt requested a 15–30 min meeting with Jessalynn and Jacob to align on the H1 outbound strategy, including content allocation.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [**Cloud DevOps Launch:** Flosum's internal announcement is set for Dec 17, requiring website updates. The new strategic messaging will be finalized by month-end for a December test.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)

## Topics

### PPC Ad Launch Blocked

  - [Launch is blocked pending updates to 2–3 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Rachel will deliver the updates by EOD today or early tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [Saakshi will then review the ad creatives to ensure messaging alignment before launch.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

### New Content Initiative: Shared Responsibility Model

  - [Flosum tasked GrowthX with creating content on the "shared responsibility model."](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**Goal:** Educate users on their security duties, as using Salesforce alone is not sufficient protection.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This is a key topic for Flosum but a low content priority internally.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [GrowthX will develop topic ideas, leveraging existing content for interlinking.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Sydnie and Matt will provide initial direction via Slack to guide the content's focus.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)

### H1 Outbound Strategy Alignment

  - [Matt requested a meeting with Jessalynn and Jacob to align on the H1 outbound strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [**Goal:** Define the strategic plan for all outbound efforts (SEO, ads), including content allocation.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [**Scope:** A 4–6 month view, detailing how the 50,000-word monthly budget will be distributed across topics.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Matt will send a calendar link for a 15–30 min meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

### Cloud DevOps Launch & Messaging Timeline

  - [**Internal Launch:** Flosum will announce its new Cloud DevOps solution internally on Dec 17.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [**Website Updates:** Required to support the launch; Matt will plan the work for the team.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [**Strategic Messaging:**](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [**Goal:** Finalize by end of month for team review and certification.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
      - [**Plan:** Use December to test the new messaging and gather feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
      - [**Status:** Receiving positive feedback from the sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Rachel:** Deliver updated articles for PPC ads by EOD today or early tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [**Matt:** Send calendar link for the H1 strategy meeting with Jessalynn and Jacob.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [**Sydnie & Matt:** Provide initial direction for the "shared responsibility model" content via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Develop topic ideas for the "shared responsibility model" content.](https://fathom.video/share/NGH3P156-9wABp_1_7UwLrvE4r2uPnuV?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

action_items.description: Plan website updates for Dec 17 cloud DevOps announcement
Send calendar link to Jessalynn; schedule 15–30 min H1 planning sync w/ Jacob
Slack Jessalynn re: brief strategy discussion agenda
